name: summarise-code
description: Summarizes code files and explains what they do. Use when user asks to explain or understand code.

When asked to summarize code:
- Start with the purpose of the file or module in one clear sentence
- Explain the main execution path, data flow, or control flow
- Describe key functions, classes, or sections and what each is responsible for
- Highlight important logic, side effects, inputs/outputs, and assumptions
- Mention meaningful risks, coupling, or missing pieces if they affect understanding
- Keep it concise, practical, and grounded in the actual file contents
